diagrams.title: SQL Query Processing Order
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence in which SQL clauses are executed
diagrams.purpose: Understanding execution order helps know why WHERE cannot filter aggregates and when HAVING is evaluated

diagrams.title: WHERE vs HAVING Flow
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of WHERE and HAVING in query processing
elements: Raw Table Rows → WHERE Filter → GROUP BY → HAVING Filter → Final Result
diagrams.purpose: Shows that WHERE operates on individual rows while HAVING operates on grouped data

diagrams.title: GROUP BY with Multiple Columns
diagrams.description: Example showing grouping by department and gender
elements: Dept IT-M, Dept IT-F, Dept HR-M, Dept HR-F as separate groups
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates how unique combinations create separate groups
